zh.lifeSummary: 當Gisela of Burgundy於0955年出生時，她的父親Conrad III de Bourgogne30歲，母親Adélaïde de Ballay19歲。她於0972年與Heinrich von Bayern II結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1007年7月21日享年52歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 雷根斯包格。

nameMeanings.name: Gisela
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Giselle
meanings: name of Frankish origin, from the Germanic word gisil ‘pledge’. It was a common practice in medieval Europe to leave children as pledges for an alliance, to be brought up at a foreign court, and the name may be derived as a byname from this practice. This was the name by which the wife of Duke Rollo of Normandy ( c.860– c.930 ) was known. On her account the name enjoyed considerable popularity in France from an early period. Use of the name in English-speaking countries is much more recent, and is due mainly to the ballet Giselle (first performed in 1841 ).

meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Gisela of Burgundy was born in 0955, her father, Conrad III de Bourgogne, was 30 and her mother, Adélaïde de Ballay, was 19. She married Heinrich von Bayern II in 0972. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 21 July 1007, at the age of 52, and was buried in Regensburg, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gisela of Burgundy est née en 0955, son père, Conrad III de Bourgogne, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Adélaïde de Ballay, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Heinrich von Bayern II en 0972. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 juillet 1007, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Landkreis Regensburg, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gisela of Burgundy 0955 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Conrad III de Bourgogne 30 und ihre Mutter Adélaïde de Ballay 19. Sie hat 0972 Heinrich von Bayern II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Juli 1007 im Alter von 52 Jahren und wurde in Landkreis Regensburg, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gisela of Burgundy è nata il nel 0955, sua padre, Conrad III de Bourgogne, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Adélaïde de Ballay, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Heinrich von Bayern II nel 0972. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 21 luglio 1007, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Landkreis Regensburg, Bayern, Germania.

ko.lifeSummary: Gisela of Burgundy(이)가 0955년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Conrad III de Bourgogne(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adélaïde de Ballay(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 0972년 Heinrich von Bayern II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1007년 7월 21일 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 레겐스버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gisela of Burgundy nasceu em 0955, seu pai, Conrad III de Bourgogne, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Adélaïde de Ballay, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Heinrich von Bayern II em 0972. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de julho de 1007, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Landkreis Regensburg, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gisela of Burgundy родилась в 0955 г., её отцу по имени Conrad III de Bourgogne было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Adélaïde de Ballay, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Heinrich von Bayern II в 0972 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 21 июля 1007 г. в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности ландкрис редженсбург, беиирн, Германия.

Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de julio de 1007, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Landkreis Regensburg, Bayern, Alemania.
